ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "total_dcr" REAL /* Total amount of DCR in the transaction */,
  "mixed" TEXT /* Information on mixed inputs or outputs */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Transaction fee */,
  "fee_rate" TEXT /* Fee rate */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., send, receive, transfer) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, confirmed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction detail */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction */,
  "input_address" TEXT /* Input address for the transaction */,
  "output_address" TEXT /* Output address for the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of DCR in the transaction */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input (e.g., wallet, exchange) */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of output (e.g., wallet, exchange) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction fee */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., transaction, network) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_fees_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction size */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the transaction */,
  "size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the transaction size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., bytes, kilobytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_sizes_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sender, receiver, auditor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_transactions" (
  "user_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction */,
  "transaction_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the transaction (e.g., sender, receiver) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user transaction (e.g., pending, confirmed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction log */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., send, receive, audit) */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_search" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* Search results */,
  "search_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_search_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction analytic */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction */,
  "total_dcr" REAL /* Total amount of DCR in the transaction */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Transaction fee */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the transaction */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of transactions */,
  "search_count" INTEGER /* Number of searches for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_analytics_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_authentications" (
  "auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user authentication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "auth_method" TEXT /* Method used for authentication (e.g., password, 2FA) */,
  "auth_status" TEXT /* Status of the authentication (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was authenticated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user authentication was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_authentications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control rule */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource being accessed (e.g., transaction, wallet) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action being performed (e.g., read, write) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the access control rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., network issue, system update) */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the event log (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)
